name: Rockstar North
short_description: One of the world's most renowned game studios, creators of the Grand Theft Auto series.
about: Rockstar North is a British video game development studio based in Edinburgh, Scotland. Originally founded as DMA Design in 1988 by David Jones, the studio created Lemmings before pioneering the open-world action genre with Grand Theft Auto. Acquired by Take-Two Interactive in 1998 and rebranded as Rockstar North in 2002, the studio has since produced some of the best-selling and most critically acclaimed video games of all time, including Grand Theft Auto III, Grand Theft Auto V, and contributed to the Red Dead Redemption series.

awards.name: Game Developers Choice Game of the Year
The Game Award for Game of the Year
